title: The Fight Against Katakuri Begins
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Katakuri, Unknown person #15, Luffy as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I even got in a kick!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've told you time and again. Your powers could never hope to defeat mine!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 16 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
